name: Fettucine Alfredo
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Light cream (or diluted Creme Fraiche)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil for the noodles.
2. As the water boils, prepare the sauce by melting unsalted (sweet) butter over very low heat in a separate pan. Do not let it brown.
3. Once the butter has melted, stir in light cream (or diluted Creme Fraiche), freshly grated Parmesan cheese. Beat with a whisk to prevent clumping.
4. Season the sauce with a pinch of Nutmeg, Fresh Parsley (optional), and Little Pepper (optional).
5. Turn down the heat to a simmer and add Fettucine noodles to the boiling water.
6. Cook until the noodles are al dente, then drain and gently toss with the sauce.
7. Serve immediately.
